summary: v104.44.4 Per-Trip Bhada Breakdown feature testing complete. All 22 backend tests pass. All frontend UI elements verified including truck dropdown, KPIs, filters, Pay button, and export buttons.
seed_data_creation: Demo data seeded via /app/backend/scripts/seed_truck_pertrip_demo.py - 2 trucks (OD-15-DEMO-1234 with 7 trips + 3 nikasis, OD-21-DEMO-5678 with 3 trips + 0 nikasis)
context_for_next_testing_agent: v104.44.4 Per-Trip Bhada feature fully tested. Backend: 6 new endpoints verified - GET /per-trip-trucks (list trucks with bhada>0), GET /{vno}/per-trip (FIFO settlement breakdown), POST /{vno}/settle/{rst} (one-click settle creates NIKASI), GET /{vno}/per-trip-pdf (PDF export), GET /{vno}/per-trip-excel (Excel export), GET /{vno}/whatsapp-text (WhatsApp text). Frontend: TruckOwnerPerTripPanel.jsx with data-testid attributes for all interactive elements. WhatsNew modal shows v104.44.4 at top.

backend: GET /api/truck-owner/per-trip-trucks → returns trucks with bhada>0, includes trips_count and total_bhada
GET /api/truck-owner/{vno}/per-trip → returns trips with FIFO settlement (settled/partial/pending), summary KPIs
POST /api/truck-owner/{vno}/settle/{rst} → creates NIKASI entry, increases total_paid
Existing VW CRUD endpoints (list, pending, next-rst) - no regression
frontend: Per-Trip Bhada tab visible in Payments (data-testid='tab-pertrip-bhada') with BETA badge
Truck dropdown (data-testid='truck-pertrip-select') shows demo trucks with trip count and total bhada
KPIs populate correctly: Total Trips, Total Bhada, Settled, Pending
Trips table shows Sale/Purchase tags, status badges (Settled/Partial/Pending)
Pay button (data-testid='truck-pertrip-pay-{rst}') settles trip, shows toast, updates KPIs
WhatsNew modal v104.44.4 shows Per-Trip Bhada feature description at top

fifo_settlement_verified.description: FIFO settlement algorithm verified - payments applied to oldest trips first
fifo_settlement_verified.test_case: Settled RST #1006 (Rs.4,000) → FIFO pool applied to older trips, RST #1006 shows 'Partial' with Rs.2,000 paid
fifo_settlement_verified.kpi_update: Pending decreased from Rs.6,000 to Rs.2,000, Settled increased from Rs.16,200 to Rs.20,200
